channel.title: Home on My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content in Home on My New Hugo Project

item.title: About Studio
item.description:
Sagaeon is a production space dedicated to technical lookdev, immersive worldbuilding, and real-time environment composition.

Core Pipelines

  • 3D & Lookdev: Hard-surface custom asset modeling, procedural neon shaders, and scene composition.
  • Real-time Environments: Unreal Engine 5 worldbuilding, custom lighting setups, and technical cinematic staging.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Welcome to the central archive. This space houses interactive worlds, real-time assets, and motion lookdev.

Featured Operations

  • Noen — A cyberpunk detective story set in a neon-drenched future. Built in Unreal Engine 5 focusing on techno-mythology themes.
  • Eternal Drive — A 3D animation lookdev project experimenting with high-contrast cinematic workflows.
